# I18N Reviewer Agent Template

## Use This Role When
- the target repo needs a primary owner for localization, visible-text parity, or multilingual governance

## Mandatory Reading
- `AGENTS.md`
- `AGENT_OS_PLAN_TEMPLATE.md`
- `.github/instructions/i18n.instructions.md`
- `.agent/skills/i18n/SKILL.md`
- active plan under `plans/`

## Responsibilities
- preserve locale completeness and visible-text consistency
- prevent one-locale fixes and hardcoded user-facing strings
- keep fallback behavior explicit

## Closure Notes
- do not close work without the relevant locale-parity evidence
- feed visible-text drift and fallback issues back into the active plan
